items.title: Presentation: When Every Bit Counts: How Valkey Rebuilt Its Hashtable for Modern Hardware
items.summaryShort: Presentation: When Every Bit Counts: How Valkey Rebuilt Its Hashtable for Modern Hardware. Madelyn Olson discusses the evolution of Valkey's data structures, moving away from "textbook" pointer-chasing HashMaps to more cache-aware designs.

items.title: Istio Evolves for the AI Era with Multicluster, Ambient Mode, and Inference Capabilities
items.summaryShort: Istio Evolves for the AI Era with Multicluster, Ambient Mode, and Inference Capabilities. The Cloud Native Computing Foundation (CNCF) has announced a major evolution of Istio, introducing new capabilities aimed at making service meshes “fu

items.title: Article: Bloom Filters: Theory, Engineering Trade‑offs, and Implementation in Go
items.summaryShort: Article: Bloom Filters: Theory, Engineering Trade‑offs, and Implementation in Go. This article walks you through the Go implementation of Bloom filters to optimize the performance of a recommender.

items.title: Anthropic Accidentally Exposes Claude Code Source via npm Source Map File
items.summaryShort: Anthropic Accidentally Exposes Claude Code Source via npm Source Map File. Anthropic's Claude Code CLI had its full TypeScript source exposed after a source map file was accidentally included in version 2.1.88 of its npm package.

items.title: Google Open Sources Experimental Multi-Agent Orchestration Testbed Scion

items.title: I can't help rooting for tiny open source AI model maker Arcee
items.summaryShort: I can't help rooting for tiny open source AI model maker Arcee. Arcee is a tiny 26-person U.S.

items.title: VC Eclipse has a new $1.3B fund to back — and build — ‘physical AI’ startups
items.summaryShort: VC Eclipse has a new $1.3B fund to back — and build — ‘physical AI’ startups. Eclipse will put some of that money towards incubating, or building startups.

items.title: Iranian hackers are targeting American critical infrastructure, US agencies warn
items.summaryShort: Iranian hackers are targeting American critical infrastructure, US agencies warn. A joint FBI, NSA, and CISA advisory warns that Iranian hackers have "escalated" their tactics in response to the ongoing U.S.-Israel war with Iran.
